components.name: Active Tab
components.description: Selected view tab on the horizontal menu.
components.css: .ds-tab-active { background: #C9A8FF; color: #16141F; padding: 0 16px; font-family: monospace; font-weight: bold; text-transform: uppercase; }

components.name: Inactive Tab
components.description: Unselected view tab on the horizontal menu.
components.css: .ds-tab-inactive { color: #A09AB8; padding: 0 8px; font-family: monospace; text-transform: uppercase; }

narrative.overview: devpkgs is designed to be a calm, spacious, and quiet terminal workspace. Instead of mimicking crowded command-line interfaces filled with raw text and jagged lines, this layout embraces whitespace, clean typography hierarchy, and soft visual boundaries.

rules.name: The Ten Percent Rule
rules.body: Accent colors (Lavender, Mint, Rose) must occupy no more than 10% of the screen. Their scarcity ensures they effectively draw the user's attention.

rules.name: The Border Priority Rule
rules.body: High-priority or focused containers use a bright primary border, while secondary or inactive containers use a muted border.

dos: Do wrap descriptions to respect panel widths.
Do use Mint Mint to show matching versions and Soft Rose for outdated/warning flags.
Do align columns cleanly using monospace cell tabs.
donts: Don't use sharp box characters for borders; always use rounded ones.
Don't overflow text boundaries; clamp or wrap long strings.
Don't mix multiple accent colors in a single line.
